name: breezedoc-pp-mcp
description: E-signature and invoicing API for documents, templates, recipients, teams, and invoice workflows.

breezedoc_api_token.title: BREEZEDOC_API_TOKEN
breezedoc_api_token.description: Optional. Sets BREEZEDOC_API_TOKEN for the BreezeDoc MCP server. Get a credential from https://breezedoc.com/integrations/api.

breezedoc_bearer_auth.title: BREEZEDOC_BEARER_AUTH
breezedoc_bearer_auth.description: Optional. Sets BREEZEDOC_BEARER_AUTH for the BreezeDoc MCP server. Get a credential from https://breezedoc.com/integrations/api.

breezedoc_bearer_token.title: BREEZEDOC_BEARER_TOKEN
breezedoc_bearer_token.description: Optional. Sets BREEZEDOC_BEARER_TOKEN for the BreezeDoc MCP server. Get a credential from https://breezedoc.com/integrations/api.
